title: Stackmon Demo
description: Stack, train and collect powerful Stackmon in this creature-collector with a card-stacking twist! Build your camp, challenge rival Scouts in combat and face the mysterious corruption spreading throughout your land.

title: Ballatory Demo 0.9
description: The demo version of Ballatory, a short incremental idler where you build and upgrade a chaotic swarm of bouncing balls to destroy cores and earn crazy amounts of money.

title: Catnip Craze Demo
description: A bite-sized incremental idle game about cats, catnip, and numbers going up. Harvest catnip, hire cats, unlock production tiers, and prestige to witness the inevitable conclusion of the craze.

title: Cubepathy Demo
description: A simple, chill platformer in almost empty space. Nail the perfect jump - now help your friend without losing your progress. Made a mistake? Now your friend can help you out. Be a platform for your friends, pull them out of the void, help them jump higher.

title: Sutra Pilgrim Demo
description: Set out on a journey through Sutra Pilgrim！ Hone your skills, gather powerful Artifacts, meet steadfast allies, and challenge fearsome Yaoguai Kings. Traverse a vast mythic world inspired by Journey to the West, seek the Sutra Pilgrim, and uncover the hidden truth behind this westbound journey.

title: WHERE TO? Demo
description: Drive a late-night taxi through a city where no one can be trusted. Pick up suspicious passengers, follow unsettling routes, and face strange conversations and irreversible choices. Tonight, who you take, where you drop them off, and where you go next are all up to you. A retro horror taxi game.

title: Little Elementals Demo
description: A chaotic escape of little elementals who want to become human! The Fire Elemental and the Water Elemental secretly visit the human world…but get caught and thrown into prison! Who came to rescue them? Can they escapeand reach the human world? Join the little elementals on their adventure!

title: PaceBreak Demo
description: Pacebreak is a first-person parkour speedrunning game. Try the demo with 5 official maps and full leaderboard support!

title: SPRAWL zero Demo
description: SPRAWL zero is a fast-paced shooter inspired by the Golden Age of 2000s FPS. Survive a brutal cyberpunk city collapsing under military rule and cult fanaticism. Use your Gravity-Gloves, augments, and an arsenal of over 40 weapons to crush those who stand in your way.

title: LIGHT FORCE Demo
description: You are a speck of light. Charge to gather power, release to dash — momentum is everything. Master four arcade modes — Race, Dodge, Break, and Battle — across 40 hand-crafted levels, endless survival runs, 10 combat arenas, and online versus.

title: Pogo Froggo Demo
description: Two frogs, one bar, zero coordination. Bounce up the mountain before your tank breaks... and before you blame each other.

title: Giga Lich Demo
description: This is a single-player PvE extraction dungeon crawler where combat is king, and resources are limited. Explore the dungeon to utilize powerful equipment and souls-like combat to overcome the dungeon's guardians.

title: Into the End (of the World) Demo
description: Drive, maintain, and survive. Explore procedural biomes in a post-apocalyptic world, scavenge for parts, and fight infected zones with friends. Build your survival machine from the chassis up and keep it running - because without it, you won’t get far.

title: Hat Together (Demo)
description: Two players, two totally different sizes, one shared goal. Grab a friend, snatch up all the hats, and try not to throw each other into the abyss in the free demo of our cooperative platformer.

title: Lost Dude Demo
description: Lost Dude is an atmospheric 2D platform-adventure game that follows a character who sets out on a journey to find their lost friend, experiences various events along the way, and embarks on new adventures together after reuniting.

title: Rally TS Demo
description: Rally TS Demo - The Ultimate Auto Simulator Experience Embark on an epic journey through the world of rally racing in TS Rally, where your dream of becoming the #1 racer in the Race of Champions begins with a single street car and rise to the global championship glory.

title: Hardware Simulator Demo
description: Build your hardware empire from scratch! Experience real business with product sourcing, dynamic pricing, online orders, and delivery management. Boost your popularity, expand your store, and become the country's most successful hardware merchant!

title: Spreadsheets & Dungeons Demo
description: A grid-based turn-based roguelike where you manage a party across a dungeon which is a spreadsheet. Explore each dungeon, level up your heroes, build synergies, scale absurd stats, and survive escalating dungeon pressure through tactical positioning and resource management.

title: Idle Aqua Driller Demo
description: Dive into the depths of the first four platforms of an offshore drilling rig and develop underwater resource extraction! Manage drilling rigs, hire divers, and send submarines to new levels. Unlock increasingly valuable layers, upgrade decks, and improve extraction speed and team efficiency.

title: A Rhapsody In Steam Demo
description: The expedition against the Dark Lord is long delayed, but the railway keeps pushing north. You ride as the Hero's advisor. The carriage is your transport — and your home. People along the way come to recognize you. Marks pile up on the walls. The Dark Lord is still in the north. The road is long.

title: Pawns Revenge Demo
description: The rules on the chessboard have changed! Start as a single pawn, gather roguelike abilities, and take your revenge on the Queen by defeating powerful pieces. Plan your moves wisely, it's your turn to checkmate!

title: Survivors: Become an Immortal DEMO
description: DEMO of [ Survivors: Become an Immortal ]

title: How To Destroy A City Demo
description: How to Destroy a City is a casual incremental game where you pilot a giant robot to destroy the city. Upgrade your robot, fight the army, and unlock special abilities and new robots. It's time to turn the city to ashes!

title: Interstellar Inn Demo
description: Interstellar Inn is a 2D hotel building and management sim in space. - DEMO -

title: MAGISTAL Demo
description: MAGISTAL is a strategic board game where you battle by developing units on the board. Units level up in the order that magic energy is accumulated! Move your units and attack your opponent with arts. The first to destroy a certain number of your opponent's units wins!

title: Knuckle Creek Demo
description: Knuckle Creek is a slapstick comedy brawler designed for friends, fun and light-hearted play sessions.

title: Keyboard Smash Demo
description: Why hello there, sir. I’m the newsboy! In this story game you run your little shop, help strange customers, and explore so many places, and probably tick people off too!

title: Duskvein Survivors - Bloodline Demo
description: Duskvein Survivors – Bloodline is a dark fantasy bullet-heaven roguelite where you fight through cursed arenas, harvest bloodline powers, and push deeper through portals into deadlier realms.

title: Link Empire Demo
description: Link Empire is a real-time strategy game based on a hexagonal grid. In this game, you just need to link nodes to command your forces, not control every unit. Focus on your development, unit combination. Choose your attack timing and path carefully. Defeat your enemies on a truly strategic level!

title: Kaido Genkai: An Anime Racing RPG Demo
description: Kaido Genkai is an open-world racing exploration game that blends the excitement of high-speed races with the charm of anime-style graphics and RPG elements, set in a nostalgic 90's fictional Japanese countryside. Come explore the open world and see who you meet along the way!

title: Lantern Lane Demo
description: A roguelite management game blending deckbuilding and shop sim elements. Recruit workers, arrange buildings, craft powerful builds, and maximise profit each run.

title: 我的傲娇妹妹 MY TSUNDERE SISTER Demo
description: 《我的高冷女友》续作来袭！与红发双马尾傲娇妹妹同住一屋，体验嘴硬心软的日常守护，解锁夏日限定的甜蜜与感动。DEMO包含最初的约20分钟时长的剧情体验，期待您的试玩！

title: Hidden Cats and Van Gogh Demo
description: Welcome to Van Gogh's art world! The playful cats have hidden a lovely adventure for you among the swirling stars and golden sunflower fields. Follow the clues from Van Gogh's mysterious outing and start this relaxing journey!

title: Space Wander Navigator Project Demo
description: 《领航员计划》是一款有美少女养成互动要素的弹幕射击肉鸽游戏，Roguelike刷宝玩法，数百种BUFF、武器、舰船、技能自由搭配！

title: 幻想郷大激突 : Touhou Impact Demo
description: 幻想郷大激突 : Touhou Impact is an unofficial Touhou Project fan game. Youkai have appeared—far too many of them. This is clearly an incident, but don't worry. In Gensokyo, the answer is simple: beat them all up first, then find the culprit later.

title: Courier Beware Demo
description: Deliver to haunted places, solve paranormal mysteries, and struggle through the daily grind in this horror life sim adventure.

title: NEKO-MIMI SWEET HOUSEMATES Vol. 2 Demo
description: Mint and her friends return in NEKO-MIMI SWEET HOUSEMATES 2! In order to save her family, a girl will defy fate itself and become the personification of miracles...

title: Barbarian Lands Demo
description: Barbarian Lands is a challenge hardcore, single-player ARPG set in a barbarian open world. The game features fast-paced combat with a lot of different weapons, exploration to find anything, horizontal and vertical, an unique risk/reward progression system, epic loots and dungeons a dangerous world.

title: Rune Craft Demo
description: 《Rune Craft Demo》 includes a complete playable survival-mode slice of the game. Enter the Stone battlefield, survive escalating monster waves, collect gold, experience, chests, runes, and gems, strengthen your weapon builds, and challenge the final boss.

title: Apocalypse: The Last RV Demo
description: Reborn 7 days before the apocalypse, empty the supermarket and modify your RV! Experience the last frenzy before doomsday + 15 days of wasteland survival. Full version is buy-to-play with no ads. Save data can be carried over to the full game.

title: 勇者勋章 Demo
description: 这是一款融合了卡牌构建、即时战术与Roguelike探索元素的俯视角动作射击游戏。 抽卡构筑： 从随机出现的牌库中抽取卡牌，实时构筑你的战斗手牌。 战术召唤： 部署近战肉盾阻挡敌人，召唤远程单位提供火力覆盖。 动态射击： 操控角色在地牢中灵活走位，躲避密集的弹幕攻击，同时寻找最佳射击角度输出伤害。 地牢探索： 穿越程序生成的随机房间，并在层层深入的挑战中解锁新的卡牌词条。

title: Digital Anima: Virtual Lifeform Care Kit Demo
description: Raise your very own desktop pet! It learns your preferences through AI-powered conversations. Get ready for a world of fun!

title: BoHeM Demo
description: Live an anti-cozy life on the sidewalks of Rainy Street. Fix apartments, tend bars, thrift for clothes, and uncover the wacky mysteries surrounding the eccentric yet seemingly normal tenants as they go about their daily lives.

title: Mythmon: Mythic Monsters Demo
description: A fusion of Hack & Slash and Strategy! Build the ultimate monster party to take down the Demon King. As a commander, combine unique Mythmon, powerful equipment, and tactical formations to lead your forces to victory!

title: Denari Demo
description: Denari is a narrative action game about a boy with telekinetic powers who must fight to save his people from the invasion of an empire.

title: Green Mist over Portland Demo
description: A detective noir puzzle deduction game. Explore a non-linear timeline during the cold war on a globe-trotting adventure following a trail of spies from a quiet English harbour town to a frozen Finnish fishing village and the corridors of an intelligence service rotten at its core.

title: Panzer Island Demo
description: A pixel-art anime strategy game where every move triggers a reaction. Play as Erika, an amnesiac scientist guided by three AI soldiers, piecing together what destroyed the island she built to protect. Drones only react when you act. Upgrade between missions. Chapter 1 is free (part of the demo).

title: Just Keep Defending And Mining Demo
description: Just Keep Defending And Mining is a unique incremental game that combines combat and resource gathering. Balance mining and survival, invest into upgrades, grow stronger every round, unlock new regions, and Just Keep Defending and Mining.

title: SFTP - Super Football Tactics Pro Demo
description: Super Football Tactics Pro drops you into the high-energy chaos of a wild football league where classic checkers meets hard-hitting strategy. Plan your moves, outsmart your opponent, and unleash game-changing special powers that can flip the match in an instant.

title: Arms Race Demo
description: A bullet hell rougelite where every floor is inspred by a diffrent contients mythology and enemies use items/weapons! fight trough folklore enemies steal their loot and fight against them again next round after theyve stolen your loot in return

title: Ironfront Express Demo
description: Upgrade your engine’s arsenal in this bullet hell, tower defense roguelite featuring the most heavily armored locomotive in existence. Engineer and command the Ironfront Express in a unique take on lane defense where you upgrade with specialized turrets, drones, and tactical abilities.

title: Hex Tower Boogie Demo
description: Hex Tower Boogie is a tower defense game about stacking absurd combos. A cannon that one-shots everything every 10 seconds? Sure. A homing splash tower? Take it. Homing + multishot + piercing + bonus damage on one bullet? ...yeah, you can have that too.

title: Reef Rise Demo
description: Reef Rise is a short incremental fishing game. Catch fishs, discover new reefs, catch shiny variants, complete requests, and unlock permanent upgrades to improve your gear!.

title: Juice Board Demo
description: Add some juice to your typing with custom carets, satisfying effects, and reactive word combos that work across your desktop. Unlock the entire Codex through achievements as you type.

title: Verdant Requiem Demo
description: “SRPG in Search of Balance" On a continent where three nations’ ideals clash, what will you choose, and what will you protect? Verdant Requiem is a SRPG about a war for balance beyond good and evil, featuring detailed 2D maps, branching storylines, resource management, and elemental balance.

title: Graveyard Report Demo
description: Collect evidence by capturing photos of anomalies. Monitor security footage for areas inhabiting strange activity, objects, or entities. Meet your hourly evidence quota and fulfill requests or you'll be fired! Solve puzzles, find answers, and uncover the truth, all while trying to survive the night.

title: Fit Happens: A Clothing Shop Simulator Demo
Terraclysm Survivors Demo
description: Terraclysm Survivors is a fast-paced action roguelike sidescroller. Earth is in peril, jump and attack through treacherous stages packed with enemy hordes while building the ultimate loadout. With up to 8 players online, defeat the invaders and survive in this apocalyptic and chaotic challenge!

title: Surf Sandbox Demo
description: Surf Sandbox is a tiny, casual surfing sim with realistic water physics. Create your perfect wave, catch a friendly ripple, get slammed by a heavy shorebreak, hit an air section, get barreled, or just sit back, relax, and watch the waves roll in.

title: SKY LEAP PIXEL SKY Demo
description: Sky Leap:Pixel Skycape Dome is a 3D pixel platformer adventure game that supports 1-4 players to cooperate and challenge. Jump and pass levels among the suspended platforms in the sky, global leaderboards and a full achievement system, and keep climbing towards the peak of the Pixel Sky Dome.

title: Pillars of Pantheon Demo
description: Build a moving Roman engine of war block by block, stacking balistae, spears, and divine powers in this fast-paced mythological horde-survival roguelite. Adapt your playstyle to face iconic bosses and endless enemies solo or in co-op. Sacrifice to the gods and let the chaos unfold.

title: Shoot Together Demo
description: Run non-stop and blast everything in your way! SINGLE-PLAYER: Level up, fight bosses, and unlock permanent upgrades. PVP MODE: Make split-second roguelike choices mid-run to leave your friend behind and claim the top spot on the leaderboards!

title: WTF: Wheels Tires and Flesh Demo
Moss: The Forgotten Relic DEMO
description: Get a first look at Moss: The Forgotten Relic, an emotional and atmospheric puzzle-adventure set within a living storybook, where a tiny hero and a watchful spirit must work together to overcome challenges far greater than either alone.

title: Cart by Cart: Supermarket Simulator Demo
CoreBreaker: Desktop Swarm Demo
description: A corner screen incremental brick-breaker where bouncing cores destroy endless swarms. Let it run in the corner of your screen while you work or jump into fullscreen and take control yourself. Unlock new Cores, expand your skill tree, survive endless waves.

title: Aaattack Demo
description: Aaattack is a deckbuilder, where you build and customize a deck of magical runes, to fight your foes and send the monsters back to the Underabyss! But beware! The monstrosities of the land have their own runes to fight with. Only a true hero can save this land. Are you ready? Aaattack!!!!

title: No Blink Allowed Demo
description: Train your timing skills to stop the clock close to zero, collect shards, and spend them on a massive skill tree in this short arcade-ish incremental game. Struggle with glitching displays, hidden timers, chaotic multi-stops, and other hazards as you improve your accuracy.

title: The Server Demo
description: A FULLY ENGLISH-VOICED otome mystery visual novel set in a fog-shrouded coastal town. Work as a waitress at an exclusive supper club, romance four men hiding dangerous secrets, and uncover the truth buried beneath. Every choice you make shapes your path and where it ends.

title: Dark Queen of Samobor Demo
description: Embark on a journey inspired by Slavic mythology and Croatian folklore in this 2.5D action-adventure game inspired by the likes of Inside, Neva, and Song of Iron.

title: 私たちはどう死のうか Demo
description: A story-driven action game in which a hopeless high school girl confronts her life within her dreams as she turns 18, progressing through magnetic movement, exploration, dialogue, and combat.

title: Websy and the Time Rogues Demo
description: Swing into battle and smash swarms of enemies with an arsenal of web-shooting gadgets and timeline spanning item builds. Websy and the Time Rogues is an action roguelike with expressive movement and dynamic web abilities. Join the Time Rogues and save the world from being frozen in amber!

title: Neo Capitalist - Stock Market Survival Simulator Demo
description: Trade by day. Eat, sleep, and survive by night. Lose everything with a single bad decision. Neo Capitalist is a financial survival roguelite where the richer you get, the harder the system fights back. Play in a realistic stock market simulation or in a dystopian cyber-punk world.

title: Shape Survivors Demo
description: The arena is shrinking. Annihilate endless swarms of angry geometry to climb the global leaderboards in this relentless bullet heaven. Collect Poly shards, upgrade your weapons, and unlock permanent meta-progression to survive the crush in Shape Survivors.

title: Screen Survivors Demo
description: An idle survivor-like that sits in the corner of your screen.

title: DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite Demo
description: CAVE's arcade bullet hell shooter returns as DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite. New stages, a new character, new music, and other new elements set the stage for a new challenge.

title: Orb Breaker Demo
description: A short incremental bullet hell game about shooting ricocheting orbs at enemies, collecting resources, and becoming over powered.

title: Wanderer Wheels Demo
description: StoryThis demo covers the beginning of Jack’s journey home.After receiving a call from Evelyn’s doctor about her worsening condition, Jack leaves the city behind and begins the long drive back home in his van.With little money and a long road ahead, he decides to turn his van into a small traveling business and earn money along the way.

title: Secret of Circadia Demo
description: Secret of Circadia is a retro pixel styled RPG Deckbuilder that combines light City Builder elements and Roguelite mechanics with classic Deckbuilder Combat to create a unique, quirky, cute and fun blend!

title: Slashbang Vertical Slice
description: Enter Slashbang, a narrative driven, movement-first first person shooter taking inspiration from games like Sonic Adventure, Jet Set Radio, and the Metal Gear series.

title: EDEN95 Demo
description: EDEN95 is the survivorlike where your gun is your engine. Survive escalating waves using the recoil of your gun, gear up in the shop, and grow stronger with every run.

title: Street Chef Simulator (Demo)
description: Get a taste of the street-food business with the Street Chef Simulator Demo! Push your cart through a sunny city, master the grill, and serve delicious hot dogs. Manage your earnings, customize your stand, and reach Level 5 for new ingredients! Start your culinary journey today!

title: Noxcode Demo
description: Reach the TOP by any means possible. Run, jump, climb, fly, or even fall your way up in this chaotic jump quest platformer. Master crazy movement, discover wild shortcuts, and push your skills to the limit!

title: Ace Expedition Demo
description: Ace Expedition is a deep deck building roguelike where you step into a realm full of unknowns and mysteries.​ Each shuffle starts a new legend. Combine cards to attack and buff, plan your best moves within a limited number of plays, and take on powerful foes.

title: Epic Card Battle Simulator Demo
description: a PvP card auto-battler simulator, play solo or with up-to 6 Friends! Play cards to summon little dudes who auto-battle each other to the death!

title: Love All My Girls
description: What would you do with infinite resurrection and time travel? Predict the future, save the world, get rich overnight… or date six girls at once? You’ve lived every man’s dream but stepped into a fatal trap. You’re just trying to make them all happy—what’s wrong with that?

title: Flip & Shop Simulator Demo
description: All simulators in one game! A cooperative city simulator where you and your friends manage businesses in a single large world. Open stores, earn money, and develop the shared city - together or separately.

title: Bake Neko Love Demo
description: You are a depressed Bake-Neko that everyone mistakes for an adorable cat. Your one and only goal: to end it all. A visual novel with multiple choices, featuring diverse, deep, magical and deeply endearing characters. Play the first chapter of the game in this demo !

title: Simulation Simulator Demo
description: You just did DMT at a campfire in the woods. Now you have to convince your best friend -- a skeptical, monitor-headed guy named Bingus -- that reality is a simulation. He doesn't believe you. The AI powering him doesn't want to. Pick apart the world's seams until one of you breaks.

title: Roguecraft DX Demo
description: Roguecraft DX is a casual yet challenging turn-based roguelike, crafted for fans of classic dungeon crawlers and inspired by Lovecraftian horror. Explore procedurally generated dungeons with mysterious potions, scary chickens, and secret rooms waiting to be discovered!

title: Rotten Chamber Demo
description: A single-player logic puzzle disguised as social deduction. Read the claims of a corrupt city council, catch the liars and arrest them, but every wrong call brings you closer to losing it all.

title: Cosdarica's Journey at the End of the World Demo
description: Human civilization had finally burned out its last spark. The survivors chose to gather together, shutting themselves within safe zones to await death. But Cosdarica did not. Neither did I.

title: Miniature Legends Demo
description: Survive in Tiny Lands—alone or with friends! Battle endless waves of creatures in small arenas, collect and upgrade powerful abilities, unlock new legends, and grow insanely strong in this fast-paced, chaotic roguelike board-battler.

title: Artesnaut Demo
description: A hardcore medieval fantasy idle RPG, almost entirely in text. Build characters with races, jobs, and epithets. Over 1,000 items to loot. A story 93% of players rated "great." Combat and exploration are fully auto—just check your results. Now in Chapter 5, unfolding across five major updates.

title: Rune Tavern Demo
description: This is an asynchronous PVP auto chess game. Arrange your runes and components, use energy transfer to activate as many rune skills as possible, and build a powerful lineup! In the face of randomly matched opponents, be the first to smash the enemy's elemental blocks and win more!

title: runz Demo
description: RUNZ is game where every bullet in your magazine matters. Survive as the waves get harder, and master an original upgrade system. Build synergies, combine bullets, manage your economy and upgrade your gun in this twin stick shooter with auto battler elements.

title: Cyber Paranoia Demo
description: Hospitalized for a mental contagion, you undergo therapy with an android. Experience love, pain, and control as your choices shape his fate – and decide your own reality.

title: DeepSeaIdle: Infinity Abyss Demo
description: Dive into an endless deep-sea idle game. Blast enemies with torpedoes, splits, and lightning to gather resources. Grow your aquarium, upgrade your sub and weapons, and crush bosses to descend deeper. Your submarine keeps mining even while you're away.

title: Eyes On Them Demo
description: Your car breaks down on a deserted road at midnight. As you walk through the fog-shrouded forest, you come upon the entrance to an abandoned factory. But this place isn’t as empty as it seems. Deep within the factory, dark traces of the past and something inexplicable await you.

title: Soup Weather Demo
description: A short narrative exploration game in which you play as Bean, an unemployed, 20-something, smart-ass. Wander around town, play mini games, feed the geese, and get to know the neighbours as Bean’s sanity begins to slip...

title: Obrum: The Demo
description: OBRUM is a roguelite puzzle game about controlled chaos. Build unstable chain reactions across a 4×4 grid, draft (and leverage) powerful Rules, survive the rising Overcharge, and push this collapsing system to its limit in a high-pressure battle for mastery.

title: A Game About Creating The Universe Demo
Access Acquired Demo
description: Censorship, corruption, and exploitation. Fight for the future of the citizens of Mendax and riot against the totalitarian government. Step into the shoes of Punkbot and fight enemies with tight and energetic combat in the 3D hack and slash game Access Acquired.

title: GLIMPO Demo
description: Fight endless waves of enemies in this arcade roguelite shooter. Build and level up your skillset, unlock synergies and become ridiculously overpowered!

title: Cut the Strings DEMO
description: Those bullets will kill the future of the girl — a Dark Horror TPSThe girl was chosen as the bride <sacrifice>.In a fictional postwar era, the Imperial Capital, bubbling with reconstruction, was struck by disaster once more.

title: Dissociated Worth Demo
description: You have no power. No allies. No certainty. A cryptic force sends you to face the impossible, where you have to see through your opponents lies before they see through yours, be they human or not.

title: Dote On Me: Desktop Pet Demo
description: This is a warm and healing desktop pet game. Raise a lovely virtual pet on your computer desktop to accompany you while working, studying and relaxing. Feed, interact with, dress up and decorate a home for your pet. Enjoy the heartwarming companionship and comfort it brings you every day.

title: Car Stunt Mania Demo
description: A physics-based 2D stunt racer with endless procedurally generated terrain. Pull off frontflips, backflips and huge combos across 5 environments with 24 unlockable vehicles. Rack up your score, upgrade your ride, and see how far you can go before you crash.

title: RZImageReader Demo
description: WebP , GIF  play inside ZIP, RAR，Supports various comic viewing modes and common web video playback.—— RZImageReader，RZIR

title: PNR: Point of No return Demo
description: You don't dodge. You push through. PNR: Point of No Return is a space opera roguelite where you blast through enemy fleets head-on, forging a new loadout every sortie. Build your arsenal mid-battle, come back alive, hit the jackpot on the Slingshot, and do it all again.

title: Touhou Brawl Demo
description: Play TOUHOU BRAWL for free! TOUHOU BRAWL is an exciting PVP BULLET HELL action brawler where iconic Touhou characters engage in a lively battle. Jump into the action against brawlers from all over the world. Play now on Steam!

title: ROAD59　-A Yakuza’s Last Stand-　【Demo】
description: This game is a demo version of the visual novel game "ROAD59 -A Yakuza’s Last Stand-".
developer: 株式会社ロケットスタジオ

title: Pizza Oof! Demo
description: Pizza Oof! is a chaotic co-op adventure game where you and your friends deliver pizza down a treacherous river. Steer your fragile raft, dodge menacing wildlife, and safely deliver the pizza before everything falls apart!

title: War of Flip Demo
description: It's a two-player card chess game. Play against your friend with chesses that have the ability to flip. At the right moment, flip the chess to release powerful skills, or hide and wait for the right opportunity to strike. In addition, build a deck and explore various possibilities!

title: Too Hot to Be True Demo
description: “Finding a wife in a week? Are you for real?!" Your parents are visiting next week, and they expect you to show up with a bride. With only days left, your only hope may be the five gorgeous women staying at your seaside guesthouse. As feelings shift fast, who will you choose?

title: Amazing Curves Racing Demo
description: Amazing Curves Racing: the simple, fast, fun & efficient VR racing simulator, where you start or join a race in seconds. The tire model works directly on cubic 3D surfaces, for a high-speed racing experience not available anywhere else.

title: WizKitty and the Tower of Doom, Gloom, and Other Bad Stuff Demo
description: Craft ridiculous loot in a roguelike deckbuilder where your deck doesn’t attack, it builds the weapon that does. Upgrade, reroll, and stack modifiers as you climb the tower and bully RNG into giving you the perfect item.

title: No One's Hero Demo
description: A 2D side-scrolling runner set in ancient times where you play as an unknown messenger racing through danger behind the scenes of a famous legend. Jump, slide, and survive 13 handcrafted levels inspired by ancient Greece.

title: Draw the Hands Demo
description: From a grid of poker tiles, you have to draw the best hands possible ! Every stage you have to beat a increased score to be allowed to move forward. Get more points from badges, backgrounds, relics, powers and others in a roguelike fashion. Every run is completely different.

title: BONE STUFF Demo
description: You wake up in hell. You are incomplete, confused, and your friends might be your greatest chance — or your biggest problem. In this dark comedy co-op adventure for 2–6 players, use your limbs, solve puzzles, and find out who reaches the exit.

title: Sunset Summit Demo
description: A co-op group climbing game for 1-8 friends! Head out on a chill but challenging climb with regular checkpoints. Use axes, ropes, pogo sticks, item delivery drones and more to reach the summit. Just remember to watch your step!

title: Bot slash Bot Demo
description: You click - You dash - You slash. Bot slash Bot is a fast-paced, top-down Hack n‘ Slash in which you control a rogue robot slashing & dashing through your former co-machines holding you captive! It's all about speed. Time is running out.

title: Camp Wombo Demo
description: Co-op survival horror game. Up to four friends must gather resources and repair their vehicle while surviving deadly creatures in a constantly changing forest.

title: basecamp Demo
description: Fight waves of mutated creatures in this roguelite tower defense game. Turrets can be used to defend or to harvest — you decide! How much can you secure before being overrun?

title: Bloodspill Demo
description: Bloodspill is a fast-paced, pvp retro fps with one hit combat, featuring classic gamemodes like deathmatch, capture the flag and conquest!

title: Star Trek: Outposts Unknown Demo
description: Lead your crew across a strange new world in this narrative driven outpost builder demo! Research, explore, and build as you face a mysterious cosmic force that threatens a new ally. Your adventure awaits, Captain.

title: Another Door Demo
description: Another Door is a multiplayer, turn-based roguelike with monsters, despair, risk and betrayal. Hide your intentions, bluff to survive and bet on your luck. Will you back out, or venture through Another Door?

title: Anti-Anti-Cheat: a musical action game Demo
description: This is a demo version of musical action game where you need to dodge many enemy bullets appearing to the rhythm of music. Can you defeat Anti-Cheat?

title: Maximum Thunderness Demo
description: An extreme response to minor problems. MAXIMUM THUNDERNESS is a roguelike side-scrolling co-op action game where you battle space alien criminals attempting to conquer Earth through a series of increasingly petty crimes.

title: Airspace Master Demo
description: Control both skies and ground in a complete ATC experience. Manage arrivals, departures, and taxi operations while maintaining Operational Integrity. Dynamic weather, a day/night cycle, multiple airports, and unique challenges.

title: Hack '95 Demo
description: Time travel to 1995 in this card-based computer hacking voyage. Take down an evil tech startup and shadowy government agency to become a god to the freaks and geeks of cyberspace. All while being helped by an incontinent virtual pug.

title: Valor Mortis Demo
description: Valor Mortis is a first-person action soulslike from the creators of Ghostrunner. Rise from death as a former soldier of Napoleon’s army. Wield supernatural powers, battle horrifying monsters, and unravel a conspiracy that threatens all of humanity.

title: Happy Bastards - Combat Demo
description: This combat demo features a dungeon delve with traps, loot, and a series of five fights culminating in a boss encounter. It does not include the open-world, nor the squad-building portions of the game. These will be featured in a full demo at a later date.

title: Bloody Grids Demo
description: A single move to carve a path through blood.Use the information on the grid to avoid, fight, and devour unseen enemies in this Minesweeper-style puzzle adventure.

title: Herd Demo
description: Build your set, outplay your rival, and win the Mélodus in a cute musical card battler where every match becomes a live performance.

title: Rift Rumble Demo
description: Rift Rumble is a lightning fast, platform party fighter where fighters from across the universe have come to battle for control of The Rift. Play with unlimited players locally across numerous unique maps.

title: Runic Curse Remastered Demo
description: Runic Curse Remastered is a thrilling action RPG Metroidvania that transports you to a cursed island. Explore dark and diverse locations, battle hordes of enemies and mighty bosses. Forge your own playstyle by combining various weapons with magical runes to overcome all challenges.

title: Construcubes Demo
description: Grab, move, rotate and connect bricks to build many cute objects ! Follow instructions to build things such as a flower, a robot or a little wood shack ! Available for PC, and for VR with Oculus Quest 2 and 3.

title: TWINSTAR Demo
description: A sci-fi fantasy Metroidvania where you play as a vampire adrift in space. Awaken in a strange space lab, explore the station, solve puzzles, defeat enemies, find hidden rooms, collect odd items, awaken lost powers, and uncover a secret buried deep within.

title: Bug Cleaners Demo
description: Bug Cleaners Demo: Stop the bug invasion! Jump into chaotic missions solo or with up to 4 players. Fun and chaos await, try it now!

title: PhotoGuessr Demo
description: Find where each cropped photo piece belongs. In photoGusser, observe the image, place your pin, and score higher the closer you are to the correct spot. Play 10-round solo challenges or compete online with up to 16 players.

title: Guildream Demo
description: Kicked out by his father for not becoming fully human, the protagonist is left in charge of a neglected guild. Guildream is a casual and comedic simulation game where anyone can enjoy managing a quirky guild.

title: Stonecall Demo
description: Stonecall is a top-down roguelike autoshooter where you must stand still to attack. Descend into the Stone Vault, fight awakened stone golems, and craft powerful relic synergies. Defeat sentinel bosses guarding each floor and uncover the vault's secrets.

title: 超时空怪盗 Demo
description: 是架空世界冒险喜剧！！！你将化身一位土著人，与一位来自20年后的少女一起组成跨时空搭档，前往未来世界冒险并搜集传说中能改变一切的宝物！本作是一款搞笑游戏，目的就是逗笑你让你开心！因此在冒险过程中，你会遇到各种各样让人啼笑皆非的事。 千万不要在喝水的时候游玩本作哦！不然你就………………不渴了呢……

title: Life on Neptune Demo
description: Build a new life and a new home on a distant planet. Explore islands to find furniture for your house. Meet aliens and make the best of a strange situation. A Life on NEPTUNE awaits.

title: Weaponized Demo
description: Weaponized is a violent mining hooter. You are an asteroid miner whose employer recently expanded into mining hell. Use your machine gun to carve through asteroids and extract ore. Grab and hurl enemies, snipe through rocks, fight massive bosses. Make your quota and get out before it's too late.

title: The Belt Demo
description: A hardcore precision platformer built around a relentless moving conveyor belt. Master unlockable movement stances, adapt to escalating traps, and survive a brutal mechanical gauntlet where every mistake matters.

title: TO THE CENTER OF THE EARTH Demo
[ABERRATION] THE ANALYST Demo
description: Dexton-City is gone. A Class C Anomaly turned its citizens into the possessed before the city vanished. You are a PRISM analyst. To decode a dead agent's recording, you must retrace his exact steps inside a neuro-simulation. Can you uncover the truth without losing your mind?

title: Poker Warrior Demo
description: This is a roguelike deck-builder game around poker suits. Hearts fuel survival, Spades drive strength, Diamonds power wealth, and Clubs embrace chaos. Through deck construction and card fusion, you can twist the suits, break expectations, and uncover wildly different builds.

title: The Isle of Lost Bees Demo
Fishbait Demo
description: Dive into Fishbait, a 4-player survival card game where every draw is a gamble. Avoid the Traps, play your cards right, and sabotage your rivals in a race to be the last fish swimming. Fast-paced, strategic, and dangerously addictive.

title: Blood Dungeon Demo
description: From the creators of Nidhogg, murder hordes of monsters in this 2D platforming autoshooter with a killer soundtrack. Collect Blood, gold, and bones to increase your powers. Can you survive the Blood Dungeon?

title: Wiseman: No More Breakups Demo
description: Fight through a moving train in a stylish rhythm-combat boss rush where timed four-button inputs become your attacks. Defeat absurd bosses, survive relationship chaos, and help August Wiseman get his phone back.

title: Throne of Decisions Demo
description: Throne of Decisions is a medieval card-based strategy game where every choice shapes the future. As King, you must maintain the balance of power by approving or rejecting the petitions of your subjects. Determine the fate of your people and lead your kingdom to glory or ruin.

title: Management In Space Demo
description: Management In Space is a gritty sci-fi strategy roguelite where you find yourself in debt. Build, mine, trade, date, and defend using stations across the galaxy, all while wars swells, aliens devastate sectors, and cults rip the galaxy apart & release demons upon the cosmos.

title: BioEden Demo
description: This is the demo version of BioEden. Step into a cozy management journey as a Keeper and bring life back to a world quietly waiting to be healed. Craft the perfect biome for dozens of wonderful animal species and use your ingenuity to restore your planet, one ecosystem at a time.

title: The Hat Man Demo
description: Experience a playable demo featuring a section from the early-middle portion of the story in this first-person psychological horror game inspired by The Hat Man urban legend, focusing on sleep paralysis, fear, and the terror of being unable to move.

title: Ampsball - Demo
description: Ampsball is a 5v5 action-packed sport that combines superhero powers under the beautiful Southern California sunshine. Grab a pair of sunglasses, a beach towel, and your most wrinkled cape for a sport that will make your arch-nemeses want to join in.

title: Fenestra Demo
description: A fusion of semi-turn-based battles and roguelike mechanics. Assemble a party of 3 heroes, explore dynamic dungeons, and discover powerful builds as you fight your way through fearsome monsters. Plan ahead and adapt to your surroundings, or meet your inevitable end.

title: Featherless Demo
description: You’re a duck. You’re armed. Everything wants you dead. Fair enough. Blast through hordes of enemies, discover ridiculous weapon combos, and grow stronger every run in this chaotic roguelike shooter.

title: Shadows of Fortificar Demo
description: A hybrid role-playing visual novel based on Dungeons&Dragons. Players take control of one of five playable characters, each of whom offers a different perspective on the story. The story is set in an original universe - the city of Fortificar, which has been struck by an incurable plague.

title: ABISMO Demo
description: ABISMO is a co-op deep-sea horror game set on the abyssal floor of an alien planet. Descend alone or with up to 4 players into shifting trenches, explore derelict facilities, and recover what you need to survive while uncovering an analog-horror mystery hidden in corrupted VHS tapes.

title: Mist Weavers Demo
description: Forget near-idle gameplay. Control both Weaver and Familiar in a unique dual-control survivor-like. Build powerful synergies, survive endless hordes, and master two characters at once.

title: Papaya Plaza Demo
description: Rebuild a cute and cozy little tourist town in this laid-back and relaxed slice of life game. Meet adorable villagers, hilarious chickens, and create your perfect little community at your own pace. In this simple sim, you're the mayor and it's up to you. What will you build today?

title: Catechesis Demo
description: Begin the story of Catechesis: meet the main characters, explore the first dungeons, and face demons in an intense one-hour gameplay.

title: TOEM 2 Demo
description: Step back into the shoes of a curious photographer and set off on a brand new adventure all about uncovering hidden details, helping friends along the way, and documenting the world’s little wonders in TOEM 2, the sequel to the acclaimed TOEM.

title: A Line Held Tight Demo
description: Tensions both political and personal are rising at the Brightworld mining colony. In this dynamic sci-fi visual novel you must decide where your heart and loyalties lie if you’re to shape the future and save yourself.

title: ATTAQ ARCADE COLLECTION Demo
description: A collection of complete, punchy games packed inside a tactile desktop launcher. You start at an old computer, with floppy disks scattered across the table. Pick one up, drag it into the drive, and boot the game. A tiny ritual before jumping into another world.

title: Soul Diagnosis Demo
description: Your patients are dying. The voices in your head are keeping score. Soul Diagnosis is a dialogue-rich isometric cRPG where you are haunted by your mistakes. Navigate a labyrinthine hospital conspiracy, engage in fisticuffs with inanimate objects, and leverage your fractured psyche to survive.

title: Gamble Inc. Demo
description: Tired of making money for your corporate overlords while you get paid peanuts? Hack into your work computer and syphon cash straight from the slots and into your bank. In this corporate dystopia jobs have been reduced to betting all you've got and letting the house (your boss) win.

title: Dark Web Incremental Demo
description: Dark web incremental is an incremental idle game where you earn money by doing criminal activities like selling drugs and hacking. Upgrade everything, and find all the pets and secrets around the map!

title: Necrovoid Demo
description: Necrovoid — a dark post-apocalyptic tactical RPG with 2d6 turn-based combat. In a world shattered by nuclear fire and Rifts, you carry a Black Parasite in your chest. Every death makes you stronger… and less human.

title: Late Night Duty Demo
description: A short, linear narrative-driven psychological horror walking simulator set in Malaysia. Play as a traumatized veteran on his first night as a school security guard, where routine patrols quickly reveal that something is wrong within the school.

title: Memoirium Demo
description: DEMO FEATURES THE FIRST TWO STARTING AREAS. Traverse a chaotic and crumbling realm of dreams composed of liminal spaces. Adapt to the world’s odd rules as a Dreamer, and defy others like you to escape the strange and eclectic subconscious landscape.

title: Project Pixel Demo
description: Welcome to Project Pixel! Build and share stages online, jump through hand-crafted levels within the game's story mode, or find hidden gems within the player-driven Community Hub! You can play single player or join a lobby with friends in online co-op.

title: Slayblade Demo
description: Build your battle-top and become King of the Streets! Collect 60+ parts, Merge their Powers, and Dominate opponents in this Chill Roguelite! Skate around a vibrant Y2K city, winning Cash and Upgrades on your way to the top. And if you Die in the game, you Die in real life.

title: Pelican Post Demo
description: Pelican Post is a cozy narrative game about building community by delivering mail to a town of charming characters. As Port Pleasant's mailman, you'll get to know the townsfolk and make a difference in their lives.

title: Spiriki: Tiny Island Demo
description: Listening to the gentle sound of the waves, take care of three small quirky nature spirits! With their help and some patience, create your own tiny cozy diorama and bring back life to your overgrown island!

title: BonkCity Demo
description: 15-minute hip-hop roguelike survivor. Dodge the block. Draft perks and mixtapes. Drop bangers. Everyone plays the same daily seed — one shared dungeon design each day, one leaderboard, one crown a day. Vampire Survivors meets Jet Set Radio meets MegaBonk.

title: A Knight of Lothen Demo
description: Hack n Slash your way out of the first level of the game with some epic metal music.

title: Milki Delivery Demo
description: Rebuild a community one bottle at a time in this tiny delivery adventure with your pet cow Milki. Gather resources and upgrade your barn, then bike along dirt paths, breezy meadows, and seaside cliffs to bring fresh milk back to the sleepy countryside.

title: Book Nook Demo
description: Build miniature diorama scenes, piece by piece. Complete beautiful book nooks as you place furniture, decorations, and small details. Relax and enjoy the peaceful satisfaction of every detail falling into place, as you discover more about each moment in time.

title: Rabbit Simulator Demo
description: Rabbit Simulator is an Action Adventure game with a strong emphasis on gun violence.

title: Farming & Supermarket: Clicker Demo
description: Click, harvest, and sell! In this cozy pixel-art clicker game, tap to grow 7 unique crops on the left and manage your custom shop layout on the right. Upgrade your Click Power and hand size to build your ultimate chill farming market empire!

title: Breeze of Hope Demo
description: Breeze of Hope is a cozy stylized adventure about loneliness, hope, and the courage to keep moving forward. Explore a peaceful fantasy world, complete light puzzles and challenges, collect crystals, and discover a small emotional journey built around atmosphere, music, and meaning.

title: Don't Lose Face! Demo
description: Don't Lose Face! is an abstract simulation game that makes you flustered and laugh until you're exhausted. What you're about to face: multi-tasking torture, facial features that slide down like cream, hilarious physics feedback, abstract random events…

title: Marsupilami 2 - Salsa Palombia - Demo
description: Help the Marsupilamis save Palombia from the Queen Mummy and her minions in this vibrant 2.D Platformer. A strange melody has swept across Palombia… and all the animals have suddenly started dancing, leaving chaos in their wake!

title: Cosmic Flesh: Overdrive Demo
description: Defend the galaxy from endless cosmic horrors. Dash and blast with fast, burst-based piloting, unleash powerful overdrives, evolve your ship with each unique run, and push your skills to the limit.

title: 都市猫眼恋语 Demo
description: Urban Cat-Eye: Love Whispers Demo is a demo for an urban light-fantasy otome indie game. Experience the very beginning of the story — a talking cat, three fateful encounters, and a young woman fighting to find her footing in the big city.

title: ShelfLife: Art School Detective Demo
description: ShelfLife: Art School Detective is a Mystery Adventure featuring a cast of romanceable weirdos! Befriend and investi-DATE 9 potential suspects. Use psychic powers to astral project into The Artworld and discover secrets. Unmask the mysterious ART KILLER that’s terrorising your campus!

title: Transcendence in the Poolrooms Demo
description: Transcendence in the Poolrooms is an adventure game where you will experience infinite relaxation. Fall into another world where you will explore haunting places beyond reality, a liminal space unlike any you have ever been to and may never escape.

title: Froggy Brews Demo
description: Froggy Brews is a cozy narrative adventure, where every cup of tea tells a story. Play as a tea-loving frog returning to your old neighborhood that has changed over time. Brew tea for villagers, uncover heartfelt stories, and rediscover your place in this world.

title: Shmup! Demo
description: Arcade-style bullet hell action! 3 ships, 5 special weapons, and screen-clearing bombs. Conquer 1 intense stage in this demo with fixed or dynamic difficulty—then compete for high scores on online leaderboards.

title: The Time‑Stealing Cat Demo
description: Side with the Demon Lord and sabotage the hero’s adventure. In The Time-Stealing Cat, you play as the Demon Lord’s pet cat and secretly interfere with the hero’s journey. Block paths, set traps, and create obstacles to slow the hero down and steal time before the final battle.

title: Tsuki Journey Demo
description: A relaxing slice of life adventure game where Tsuki travels between beautiful cities, meets new friends, uncovers stories, and fills out collection logs at his own pace, combining cozy idle activities with short, meaningful bursts of progression.

title: KILL HIM Demo
description: In slaughter and exploration, seek the truth. KILL HIM is a black-and-white Metroidvania game where you will traverse a hostile world, challenge powerful enemies, and uncover the secrets hidden behind everything.

title: Cauldron Inn Demo
description: Trying to save yourselfe something unknown but unmistakably sinister, you hide in a mysterious inn. However, your temporary refuge turns out to be a trap, and now you must find a way to escape.

title: BookStore Simulator Demo
description: Open your dream bookstore and begin sowing the seeds of knowledge among locals. Push the boundaries of possibility and immerse your business in a world of magic.

title: Operation: Outbreak Idle Demo
description: Play the Operation: Outbreak Idle Demo and survive against relentless zombie hordes in the first biome. Experience the core progression system, unlock powerful upgrades, and get a preview of the full game's weapons, skills, and zombie-slaying action.

title: Anomalogenos Demo
description: Anomalogenos is a fishing shooter where you spin the reel to shoot and dodge enemy bullets! You can create a variety of builds using different skills! Challenge yourself to dive deeper and search for stronger fish and better rewards! The demo lets you enjoy about one-sixth of the full game's content

title: Toxic Yuri Demo
description: An overworked office lady discovers a sludge girl abandoned in a box in an alleyway and takes her home. A poisonous and fluffy romance begins. Experience the most toxic love story the world has ever seen. In the demo play all of Episode 1!

title: ASEMA Demo
description: Build a space factory. Mine, harvest, exploit. Manage logistics with railguns, ballistic payloads and gravity-bending haulers. Fight gravity with Focus, climb the tech tree. Expand and explore the solar system in this factory automation sim. Everything is a potential resource - even the Locals.

title: The Meaning of Auri Demo
description: Follow an Auri Field Researcher from the planet Auriga, as they land in an enchanted forest full of creatures who speak an unknown language. Interact with the inhabitants of the forest and learn their language to complete your research–and maybe learn a thing or two about what Auri really means.

title: Demon Rising Demo
description: Demon Rising is a dark fantasy roguelike auto-battler where you rule as the Demon Lord. Recruit LLM-driven demons who talk back, build class synergies, equip relics, and survive three chapters of heroes, bosses, and brutal events.

title: Bookmark Hero Demo
description: Bookmark Hero is a fantasy, peripheral-idle RPG. Play from a bookmark-sized window on the side of your screen and instruct your hero with queued tasks. Watch as they explore lands, conquer monsters, hone skills, craft gear, and embark on quests. Even as you work, their legend unfolds.

title: 塔防江湖2 Demo
description: 试玩版本只提供了一关的试玩体验。最多开放了6个门派同时上阵，供小伙伴们体验

title: Alien Apocalypse Demo
description: In this demo you will be able to try out Alien Apocalypse an open-world sandbox survival game set after a devastating alien invasion. Scavenge for resources, craft, build defenses, and harness alien technology to fight back. Play solo or in co-op and reclaim what’s left of the planet.

title: Hoverise Rebellion Demo
description: Pilot a fast and agile HoverTank in a sci-fi vehicular arena shooter focused on high-speed movement, explosive combat, abilities, and classic multiplayer modes.

title: Hug Factory Demo
description: Hug people to generate electricity to sell for money to upgrade your hugging skills to hug people to generate electricity to sell for money to upgrade your hugging skills to hug people to generate electricity to sell for money to upgrade your hugging skills to hug people to generate...

title: 1666: Amsterdam (Prologue)
description: This prologue is a narrative experience lasting approximately 30 minutes. It introduces the world, characters, and mystery of 1666: Amsterdam. The core gameplay loop, i.e. investigation, tracking, and confronting the Originals during the Esbat begins in the full game.

title: Beetle Sumo Demo
description: A table-top arcade style party game where you battle to be the last beetle standing in the arena. Pick it up and play instantly with very simple mechanics. Simple, easy to learn fun with your family and friends.

title: Thug Destroyer Demo
description: Horror platformer where you play as a thug trapped in a deranged superhero's simulation. 9 jump your way through 9 twisted levels and find 9 thuggies to escape. Spend 9 Nights at Thuggy's, Wake up in Quiet Hill, and solve puzzles at Evil Residents.

title: Spy Carnival Demo
description: Spy Carnival is a 2-10 player social deception game set in a vibrant, chaotic funfair. Spies hide among the crowd, sabotaging rides and eliminating visitors while blending in with NPCs. Officers must stay sharp, read the crowd and take down the spies before the carnival turns into complete chaos.

title: Mortal Shell II - Open Beta
description: Step into the ravaged world of Mortal Shell II and begin the Harbinger’s journey. Play the opening three hours of the game in this limited Open Beta, with select progress carrying forward into the full release.

title: Dungeon Dilemma Demo
description: A Dungeon Builder and Crawler Roguelike where you can construct your own dungeon or raid one designed by your friends. Vie for victory, defeat minions, and evade traps as a party of up to 4 Challengers, or create the most diabolical dungeon imaginable as the Dungeon Boss!

title: ROGUELIKE CARD:BUSINESS EMPIRE Demo
description: "Roguelike Card Game: Business Empire" combines roguelike with card strategy. Choose your character, build your industrial park from scratch using cards, experience multiple victory paths, and compete on the global leaderboard.

title: Kodama: Slumber of the Gods Demo
description: Kodama is a 2D hand-drawn action-adventure set in the world of Japanese folklore. Experience fast-paced platforming, fluid combat, and a mystical journey through a colorful, spirit-filled land.

title: Take The Wheel Demo
description: Some days you just keep moving. Play as a teddy bear collecting scattered clarinet pieces while a shadow car follows close behind. A quiet narrative platformer about control, forgiveness, and finding your way back.

title: Fantasy World Manager Demo
description: Create a vast, living fantasy world: heroes, creatures, quests and events; cultures, religions and factions; overworlds, interiors and dungeons-filled with stories, wars and choices.

title: Master Fall Demo
description: Master Fall is a 2D psychological horror puzzle-platformer where players rotate the world to manipulate gravity, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden secrets as reality slowly collapses into a surreal nightmare.

title: One more time demo
description: Parkour through flying islands, loot weapons, craft tools, and sabotage your rivals in a chaotic survival race where one mistake can send you from first place to last

title: The Convergence Demo
description: A dark fantasy squad auto-battler where you recruit heroes from multiple eras, equip behavior-shaping chips, and fight through real-time battles across a collapsing timeline.

title: REDLINE — Strings of Fate Demo
description: A sci-fi otome game where your choices shape love — and the future of society. Begin your your first semester at Redhaven University and meet the those who will change your fate and who you may change in return.

title: Bros Survivors Demo
description: Two players, one body, absolute chaos. Survive enemy hordes in this co-op Survivors-like. Merge with a friend into a giant mech: one controls horizontal movement, the other vertical. Will you coordinate or die trying?

title: Hawthorn Proof-of-Concept Demo
description: Former developers from Bethesda, BioWare, and Naughty Dog bring you a sandbox RPG realm of anthropomorphic animals and fairy creatures. Play co-op or solo as you build a village of memorable NPCs, farm, craft, explore, and celebrate the seasons in an ever-changing world bigger than you.

title: Rift Horizon Demo
description: A survivors-like action roguelike. Slay swarming enemies to gather souls, offer them at altars to unlock and upgrade passives, and combine 25 skills to build differently every run. Each run lasts around 20 minutes.

title: Pibcremental Demo
description: A cozy, chaotic idle-incremental clicker about growing a civilisation of tiny creatures called Pibbles in a giant tree, set in a post-human world.

title: Waiting for Heaven Demo
description: Waiting for Heaven is a psychological first-person-horror experience about waiting at a lonely bus stop between life and death. Every decision counts. Your actions, patience, and behavior determine whether the final bus takes you to Heaven, Hell, or somewhere far worse.

title: The Background Warrior Demo
description: Always open at the bottom of your screen, this idle game lets you advance through stages full of monsters. Master different jobs and become the strongest.

title: Dice Beauty: Roguelike Tactics Demo
description: Dice Beauty is a turn-based tactical roguelike where battles are fought with dice, cards, and elemental strategy.Instead of traditional monsters, you face beautiful elemental heroines, each representing a different element with unique strengths, weaknesses, and behaviors.

title: Adventure Honor Demo
description: Adventure Honor is a rogue-like RPG. On your journey, you’ll collect skills and items to build your character. With the right buffs and upgrades, you can grow into a powerful warrior as you explore.

title: Grid Wars: Last Stand Demo
description: Command a growing army in a fantasy tactical auto-battler. Place warriors, archers, monks, and heroes on an expanding grid, defend your keep against enemy waves, and conquer a world map filled with quests, rewards, and boss battles.

title: Nowhere Road Demo
description: Nowhere Road is a winter-themed driving and taxi game set in a post-war city. Drive through quiet nights, deliver passengers, and experience a calm, atmospheric world focused on immersion and slow-paced driving rather than speed or competition.

title: Text Dungeon: The Ring of Life Demo
Saintless Demo
description: Explore the halls of the underground cult of The Open Hand. Experience the test rooms setup for your initiation in this psychological horror exploration game. Never forget....they are always watching.

title: Sineus Arena Survivors Demo
description: Fight hordes and defend your Stronghold in a bullet heaven survivor-like with co-op and tower defense. Gain power-ups every level, collect random artifacts from chests and grow stronger to survive, defeat the boss and claim a top spot on the Sineus Arena leaderboards!

title: MetalGods Demo
description: MetalGods is a music career simulation where you rise from bedroom artistto rockl legend. Write songs, record albums, recruit bandmates, and dominate the charts in this deep management game that puts YOU in control of your metal destiny.Will you become the next metal god, or fade into obscurity?

title: Ibiza Madness: Zombie vs Demons Demo
description: Fight through a chaotic island overrun by zombies and demons in this fast-paced action survival game. Explore Ibiza, battle hordes of enemies, upgrade your weapons, and survive the madness alone or with friends.

title: TV Boy Demo
description: A Demo for TV Boy! An action packed top-down shooter. Blast waves of weird and whacky enemies with even weirder weapons to rescue the captured citizens of TV Topia and restore peace to the galaxy!

title: Left Fore Dead: Zombie Battle Golf Demo
description: A chaotic multiplayer golf game where zombies keep showing up and your friends make everything worse.

title: Forest of Numbers Demo
description: Guide a hungry little monster through arcade-style number challenges by eating correct answers, avoiding danger, and building high scores in a colorful educational adventure.

title: Online Boxing 3D Demo
description: A physics-driven boxing simulation where every punch is calculated in real time. Master timing, positioning, and footwork to outbox your opponent.

title: ELEMENTAL RUN Demo
description: ELEMENTAL RUN is a first-person 3D endless runner. Navigate through increasingly dense traffic and survive as long as possible. By jumping, sliding,at the right moments.

title: Screenbound Demo
description: Screenbound lets you discover a dual reality through the Qboy! Navigate challenging puzzles and battle through multiple levels in a blend of 2D and 3D platforming that creates the world’s first '5D' platformer.

title: Down Under Destruction - Demo
description: Down Under Destruction is a stylised first person action brawler with an Australian twist, featuring a vengeful bricklayer taking on a demonically influenced building corporation, one brick throw at a time.

title: Hovertron Demo
description: Hoverboard your way through a physics-based platformer. Easy to learn but hard to master; Flow and flip through a series of levels to chase perfect runs. Compete on a global scoreboard, or hunt down the secrets hidden throughout the game.

title: BloodSworn Demo
description: BloodSworn is an intense, FPS Roguelite where players navigate through various levels with an arsenal of diverse weapons and magic in a blood-soaked, and terrifying adventure.

title: Defy The Abyss Demo
description: Survive relentless hordes in a dungeon deep within the Abyss. Swap between two heroes, unleash powerful spell combinations, and crush nightmares, demons, and immense horrors to grow stronger with every run.

title: Gambition Demo
description: A roguelike chess strategy game where chess pieces evolve into powerful forms, gaining unique abilities and devastating synergies across ever-changing boards.

title: Sender Unknown Demo
description: Work the night shift in an underground sorting facility. Weigh packages, compare their contents, and meet your quota by 6 AM. But beware, some packages hide dark secrets. Identify bad batches, earn cash, and survive the night in this tense PSX-style horror job simulator.

title: GeckoShop 2 Demo
description: Open boxes and collect geckos. Merge them in your lab to create new mutations, then sell or keep 'em. Decorate your new home, and build machines to automate every step.

title: Replay Value: Second Hand Games Demo
Guardian of the SacredSeal Demo
description: "Guardian of the Sacred Seal" is a story-driven adventure game centered on the concept: “To be unconditionally loved by a yandere young man.” In the otherworldly paradise of Gokurakudō, a young girl partners with a mysterious man to handle seemingly ordinary requests that hide deeper secrets.

title: Snack Factory Together Demo
description: Manage a snack factory together! Produce various treats for maximum profit. Upgrade machines, unlock new products, and deliver massive orders. Can you handle the demand?

title: 核心防线 core defense line Demo
description: You are a cloud operator. In the game, to protect the core and resist the continuous virus invasions, you build defenses, construct cards, install creatively designed plugins that provide you with various attack methods, repair external nodes, and at the same time offer you more convenient defense.

title: HEME Demo
description: "HEME is a deep narrative journey inspired by real-life struggles. Experience emotional storytelling through sincere dialogues in a 2D atmospheric side-scrolling world. Follow a journey that mirrors the weight of reality. Join us and discover the meaning of life."

title: Cozy Game Restoration Demo
description: Cozy Game Restoration is a soothing simulator where you gently bring forgotten video game cartridges back to life. Tear wrapping paper, peel old stickers, lift away grime, and transform dusty relics into cherished collectibles. No pressure or failure, just the quiet joy of restoring memories.

title: Corelith Demo
description: Corelith is a wave-based roguelike top-down action game. Explore the Corelith Dungeon, craft Skill Cores, and create your own unique build.

title: Miraclawns Demo
description: A unique roguelite strategy where you strengthen slimes through gambling. As the Demon King, use fate-altering bets to boost your small slimes' stats and deploy them to the frontlines. Will your judgment or overwhelming "luck" overcome the brutal battlefield?

title: Mirth Island Demo
description: Mirth Island is a cozy rhythm adventure game where you play as Dodo, a young duck, who returns home and teams up with his friends to rebuild the island’s legendary theater. Explore a vibrant island, interact with charming locals, and enjoy fun rhythm games.

title: Blueprint: EV Demo
description: Blueprint: EV Demo is a single-player strategy game about founding an electric vehicle company and running it through six fiscal years. Make five binding decisions at the start, then guide pricing, production, R&D, and finance across 8 quarters of real P&L and three rivals companies.

title: 光与影之恋 Chiaroscuro Lovers Demo
description: A domineering CEO-like older sister who’s gentle only to her sister, a childhood friend who became her doctor, and a cheerful girl only she can see… Who was Chu Hebai before losing her memories, and how did she become entangled with them? A melancholic yuri AVG about regret and unspoken love.

title: 137_DEMO_BUILD
description: CONNECTION ESTABLISHED TO 137 BETA BRANCH WELCOME USER

title: Carpet Cleaning Simulator Demo
description: Clean carpets, earn money, and grow stronger in this incremental cleaning game. Scrub, rinse, and squeegee your way to profit—before time resets and you start again.

title: PRELUDE Dark Pain Demo
description: Prelude Dark Pain is a Tactical RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Assume the role of a local blacksmith named Soren, lead an uprising against the Order of the Ashen Crusade and save a world ravaged by war.

title: Queen's Blade Re:Build Demo
developer: SE Mobile and Online Co.,Ltd., CREEK & RIVER Co., Ltd.

title: Hawkshaw Case: Truth & Prevention Demo
description: The Demo for Hawkshaw Case: Truth & Prevention. Play the first part of the first case! Learn the basics and have a little fun too!

title: BOT.vinnik Chess: USSR vs the World Demo
YGGDRA: SURVIVOR Demo
description: "You want ME to save the world? I'm just a convenience store part-timer!" A black tower threatens Earth. Summon 30 legendary heroes to climb 100 floors! Roguelite defense meets bullet-hell survival. Command your champions from zero to hero!

title: Overvoid Demo
description: Overvoid - is a dark sci-fi third-person action roguelike. You are a starship pilot trapped in an endless cycle across hostile space sectors. Fight relentless enemy waves, experiment with builds, gather resources, and unlock weapons, ships, and modules to break the cycle.

title: Shepherd Demo
description: A post‑apocalyptic visual novel centering on humanity, violence and faith. In the wasteland where human civilization has collapsed and all order crumbled, what conflicts and connections will arise from the encounter of a handful of survivors? Is death the end? And how shall a new world dawn?
developer: 黑眼圈工厂 Dark Circle Studio

title: Sudoku Bactron Editor DEMO
description: Sudoku Bactron Editor DEMO. This is not a complete game, it's an editor for Sudoku grids provided by Sudoku Bactron.

title: SEC-NULTOR Demo
description: As an amnesiac employee, complete your re-evaluation in an entity containment facility to obtain access to your original living quarters. Manage and work with containment cells up close to ensure you complete your work day without much casualty.

title: Idle Asteroids Demo
description: An incremental arcade survival game combining classic retro space combat with deep permanent progression. Survive intense rounds to gather resources, buy weapon upgrades, and transform your basic fighter into a fully automated, idle asteroid-mining dreadnought.

title: PopVibe Demo
description: PopVibe is a casual rhythm game centered around pop music. Using only your keyboard, you can play along with various tracks in a straightforward, easy-to-learn manner. It is designed for players looking for a simple way to interact with music.

title: Cards of Sparkle Demo
description: A puzzle-adventure card game that retraces the evolution of human civilization. Starting from the very first Sparkle, light up nodes along the tech tree—drag, combine, and inspire your way through humanity's journey,Decode the Golden Record.

title: Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle Demo
description: Once you open this book, you are no longer just a reader. A "reading-style" fantasy adventure in the spirit of The NeverEnding Story — handcrafted over six years by a 30-year veteran from Vanillaware. 100% handmade, from the first page to the last.

title: Skycore Reboot Demo
description: Skycore Reboot is an action roguelike game centered on skill-building. You will venture through randomly generated floating cities, freely assembling acquired skills and equipment, defeating the ultimate magitek weapon, and rebooting the skycore to alter the fate of the falling sky islands.

title: Frutiger Home Demo
description: Decorate your dream frutiger home in this cozy co-op frutiger house decorating game. Pick a home layout, add from a wide range of frutiger-themed decor and hang out with your friends!

title: Revenger3 Demo
description: ガラケー時代のレトロRPG、リベンジャーシリーズ第三作！

title: 墨卷奇路 Demo
description: Mojuan is a single-player roguelike deckbuilder blending deck construction with Qishu board space management. Enter painted scrolls, plan around cards, relics, consumables, and the Nine Gates, and face forest spirits, strange formations, and eerie encounters.
developer: 杭州执棋者网络科技有限公司

title: Richer than the King Demo
description: Create immense wealth, build a rebel army, and overthrow the crown in this medieval economic strategy game. Trade daily, invest wisely, bribe royal scouts to stay hidden, and rally fellow nobles to survive clashes against the King's forces

title: The Telwynium: Book One
description: Book One - Winter's Dawn. The first chapter in a 90s fantasy adventure epic from the creator of The Drifter. It's your first night away from Willows Dene, and you have first watch.

title: ZapStick Demo
description: Zap and watch them fly. ZapStick is a colorful, chaotic magic brawler where exploding crystals and flying bodies make every match unforgettable. Solo or with friends - pure mayhem, your way.

title: The Heart of Gold Demo
description: The Heart of Gold: Demo is an Hybrid Bullet Heaven-JRPG game, where each character is unique thanks to their own abilities, progression, and combat style. Upgrade your equipment, evolve your weapons, collect cards, and survive hordes of enemies in a colorful world full of secrets and challenges.

title: lily's world XD Demo
description: Lily was an ordinary teenager in 2004, and you just found her laptop. Read her diary, message her friends, and piece together what happened to her before it’s too late. But you're not the only one with access to her computer… Play the first chapter of Lily’s story in this demo.

title: Fields of Aaru Demo
description: A cozy life sim set in the mystical afterlife of Ancient Egypt. Farm along the Nile, befriend the locals, and decorate your eternal home. Venture into the desert and discover oases, pyramids, and tombs. Unlock magical powers by restoring ancient obelisks and making offerings to the gods.

title: Portabellows Demo
description: Explore a whimsical island to find… pie recipes?! Bake them by gathering or growing ingredients, which may be the key to helping out your new found quirky friends leave the island! In this wholesome 3D platformer collectathon, you can enjoy discovering the world freely at your own pace.

title: Burger Bois Demo
description: Become Patty, the accidental owner of a failing food business. Craft tasty (or nasty) burgers, discover new ingredients, and work hard(ish) to redeem your reputation on the way to the best parking spot of all time. Play with your food in this cozy food truck simulator!

title: Art Studio Simulator Demo
description: Bring your wildest imagination to life in your art studio. Paint, sell, build your own gallery, and invite friends to admire your art.

title: Colossus - Eternal Blight Demo
description: Your brother is corrupted. The Blight is spreading. Only you can stop it. Colossus is an atmospheric pixel action-adventure where you master precise combat, explore a vast dark fantasy world, and make choices that permanently scar the kingdom of Eireos.

title: Sanctus Wars Demo
description: Sanctus Wars is a small indie dark fantasy action game. Summon hellish units, cast spells, grow your heroine, and defend the portal against waves of enemies.

title: Plush Rangers Demo
description: Survive waves of wacky mutated constructs to defeat powerful bosses with your team of Plushie friends in this quirky chaotic Survivors-like. Earn merit badges to unlock new Plushies, relics, items, and upgrades.

title: T.W.I.R.L. Demo
description: It's 3am in your childhood home. Everyone's asleep, but you. Sneak out of your room and do as you're told - "T.W.I.R.L." - whatever that means.

title: In The Mist of War Demo
description: In the Mist of War is a turn-based online PvP strategy game. Select your units, position them strategically, and outsmart your opponent in a tactical top-down fog-of-war battle.

title: Plant Game Demo
description: A short run-based survival game where you grow a plant with limited perception, unlock sensors to read the environment, and reach a bloom/death reveal that shows what your run created.

title: Incremental Stand Demo
description: Incremental Stand is an incremental strategy tower defense game where you scavenge resources with your cursor, place survivors through a city overrun by zombies, fight zombies, and grow stronger through a skill tree and powerful upgrades.

title: Labyrinth Demo
description: Climb a 100-floor Labyrinth in a third-person anime action RPG featuring skill-based combat, persistent progression, powerful build customization, and Epic Boss encounters every 10 floors.

title: Quantum Quartz Demo
description: Steampunk pixel-art precision platformer where you toggle platforms on and off using colored crystals. With only one active at a time, each grants a different movement ability, changing how you move and how the level works, blending high-skill platforming with spatial puzzles.

title: Chess Pawn Demo
description: Chess Pawn is a fun puzzle-platformer in which the hero dreams of becoming a king. Your goal is to claim the royal crown, but along the way you’ll have to eliminate the competition… by knocking your opponents off the board.

title: Billion Egg Farm Demo
description: Billion Egg Farm is a first-person automation game where you put chickens to work laying eggs and build production lines for eggs, meat, and processed goods.

title: Tiny Capsule Collector Demo
description: Run a cozy capsule shop at the bottom of your screen. Attract cute animal customers, collect charming capsule toys, and build a relaxing, ambient world in this idle sim bringing you small moments of joy while you work. Make your desktop a place you’d rather be.

title: DVD Dealer Simulator Prologue
description: Build and manage your own DVD game store in DVD Dealer Simulator. Buy, sell, and trade game discs, expand your inventory, upgrade your shop, and move to bigger locations as your business grows. Turn a small store into a thriving gaming retail empire.

title: Valkyrie Raid Demo
description: Deliver devastating close air support while commanding a dynamic battlefield in this 2D action shooter with real-time strategy and roguelite progression.

title: CatCha Demo
description: Discover CatCha a Cozy and Roguelike solo game for PC. Take care of your cats, decorate multiple rooms in the Cat-Castle and play the strategic Dice Builder Rogulike!

title: Minibus Simulator Demo
description: Manage your own minibus route through the narrow streets of the city. Transport passengers, load luggage, monitor your fuel, and complete your route while staying alert for police inspections.

title: Neat Demo
