description: Feeling overwhelmed? Hi, I’m Molly. I help people sort their space, organize their belongings, and bring calm back into their lives. Let’s take it one object at a time and make everything feel neat again. Tell me your story. I’m here to listen.

title: AstroDig Demo
description: Mine, defend, and profit across planets. Expand your operation, survive enemy waves, and discover dangerous hidden worlds in this minimalist sci-fi strategy shooter.

title: Lezarishia Stories  Trial Version
description: "Lezarishia Stories" is a classic command-based JRPG set in a 2.5D world that blends pixel art and 3D visuals. Pursue the stolen Holy Sword and set out on a grand retro-fantasy adventure with a cast of memorable companions!

title: Gardens Of Lutonia Demo
description: Gardens of Lutonia is a contemplative druidic sandbox. Terra-farm a world with your harp-staff and your cat, freeze plants mid-growth to compose living patterns, or build your own dungeon-gardens in the Map Editor. No combat. Just vibes. 🌿

title: Blighthold Demo
description: Blighthold is a 2D city builder set in a Lovecraftian-Dieselpunk world. Reclaim the lost city and its Eldritch Tree. Suffer through moral dilemmas that will shape your society. Defend against abominations and uncover the terrible secret that lies below.

title: NoodlePunk Demo
description: Forced into a corporate-mandated work program, you run a cyberpunk noodle shop to pay off a crushing debt. Prepare orders fast, manage your ingredients, and upgrade your operation while keeping up with relentless customer drones.

title: AKIBA LOST Demo
description: Thirteen years ago, six girls vanished in Akihabara in the unsolved case “The Akiba Vanishing”. Daiki Shinjo announces a live-action game based on the incident, gathering six women who embody Akihabara’s subculture. But their story begins to seep into reality. Can AKIBA LOST be finished?

title: GENERAL IDLER Demo
description: Experience the thrill of global conquest with a limited demo of GENERAL IDLER. Train your army, conquer neighboring nations, and unlock a taste of strategic gameplay. Will you make the right moves to expand your empire? Your path to global control begins now!

title: Undying Flame Demo
description: Survive a minimalist wave-survival rogue-lite. Keep the fire alive. Read its flame. Defend your fire against creatures that crawl from the dark across endless waves. Every wave survived, the fire grows. Over time, it consumes everything.

title: Chaos Coin Demo
description: Your coins are your actions in this roguelike coinbuilder. Plan your turns to shove, evade, and attack your foes in tactical lane-based combat. Upgrade coins with new faces unique to every character to build complex combos. The forces of Chaos are coming…so use your heads (and tails)!

title: Zap Blastum Demo
description: Robots have invaded your planet, and they don't even see you as a threat. Beat the odds and SAVE THE GALAXY in the FREE DEMO of this twin-stick cover shooter with lock-on targeting!

title: Bittersweet Blossoms Demo
description: A lesbian romance set in England shortly after WWI. The story centres around Dot, a young maid who begins to work in the crumbling stately home of Bly, and her young mistress: the devious, devilish Patience.

title: Foxy Dumplings Demo
description: In Foxy Dumplings, you’ll run your own food truck and make friends along the way. Cook dumplings from all over the world, take good care of your clients, and discover how a meal can mend more than just hunger in this cozy cooking sim. Rise to the top of Foxtagram, one heartfelt dish at a time.

title: Data Center Simulator Demo
description: Step into a realistic first-person data center simulator. Badge in, diagnose faults, replace hardware, configure networks, and manage critical infrastructure. 45 training scenarios across 9 categories teach real-world skills that prepare you for data center technician careers.

title: 50 Years Classic Demo
description: 50 Years Classic is a minimalist turn-based strategy game where you can choose from a variety of nations, each with its own unique feature. The game offers fast, engaging gameplay with high replayability. This is a demo version.
